skills.name: Stabbing
skills.description: Repeatedly stab enemies. When stabbing the enemy consecutively, final damage to the enemy increases by 10%.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 16
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Damage increase up to 150%

skills.name: Pierce
skills.description: Damage the enemy by stabbing strongly.

skills.name: Finestra
skills.description: Temporarily switch into the Finestra stance to attack.
skills.effect_text:
Discover more
Handbags & Purses
coffee
Doll
Additionally applies Critical Rate by CaptionRatio % when attacking
Duration: 15 secoonds

skills.name: Synchro Thrusting
skills.description: Grab the weapon with both hands and attack the enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
Adds 30% of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR

skills.name: Spear Throw
skills.description: Throw your spear to attack the enemy. Targets hit by the spear are knocked down and become afflicted with the Shock debuff.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
[Shock] Duration: 5 seconds

skills.name: Spear Lunge
skills.description: Repeatedly stab the enemy in front and ignore a part of the enemy's Defense.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Ignores enemy Defense by 15%

skills.name: Sharp Spear
skills.effect_text: Increases Final Damage by CaptionRatio % when Critical hit occurs

attributes.name: Stabbing: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Stabbing] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Spear Throw: Explosion
attributes.description:
* When using [Spear Throw], an explosion equal to the damage of Spear Throw's consecutive hit occurs

* Explosion occurs after 2 seconds and gives damage to a maximum of 8 enemies

* Knockdown effect of Spear Throw is removed

attributes.name: [Arts] Stabbing: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Stabbing] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Pierce: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Pierce] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Synchro Thrusting: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Synchro Thrusting] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Spear Throw: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Spear Throw] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Spear Lunge: Enhanced Upgrade

attributes.name: Spear Expertise: Destroy Magic Circle
attributes.description:
* Stack 1 [Destroy Magic Circle] Buff per 1 second when moving

* 1 [Destroy Magic Circle] Buff stack reduced per 1 second when standing

* Destroy 1 magic circle when using Spear Throw, Steed Charge, Gae Bulg during 10 stack.

attributes.name: [Arts] Synchro Thrusting: Repeated Hits
attributes.description:
* Number of hits doubles

* Increases Cooldown by 15 seconds

* Applies [Stun] for 2 seconds when counter is accurate.

attributes.name: Hoplite: Accumulation
attributes.description: * Increases Final Damage by 30% on the last overheat of Pierce, Synchro Thrusting, Spear Throw, and Spear Lunge
